title: Specify source-adapter Evidence
description: Validates a single source-adapter `Evidence` document per workflow §Source adapter contract — the per-source result of `extract`, persisted under `.specify/slices/<slice>/evidence/<source>.yaml`. The document's `(slice, source)` identity is carried by its on-disk path (slice directory + `<source>.yaml` filename), and its adapter resolves from `plan.yaml.sources.<source>.adapter`; neither is duplicated in-document. Top-level fields: `authority` (closed enum `intent | documentation | behaviour`), `lead` (kebab-case lead id from `discovery.md`), and `claims[]`. v1 resolves authority at document level; the only operator override surface is the per-slice `authority-override` on `plan.yaml` (a per-Evidence `authority-overrides` map is deferred to a future RFC). Each claim carries a closed `kind` from {intent, requirement, criterion, decision, section, diagram, contract, example, excerpt, type, call, region, container, leaf} — `region`/`container`/`leaf` are the spatial kinds co-introduced with the `screenshots` source adapter; `example` is the runtime capture kind emitted by the `captures` source adapter and carries open per-kind body fields `replay-digest` (`sha256:<hex>`), `input`, and `output`. `id` is required on `requirement`, `criterion`, and `example` kinds and optional on others; `path` matches the grammar `<path>` | `<path>#L<n>` | `<path>#L<start>-L<end>`. Per-kind body fields (`statement`, `criterion`, `decision`, `replay-digest`, `input`, `output`, etc.) are intentionally open.

authority.description: Document-level authority class for this Evidence per workflow §Authority hierarchy. v1 resolves authority at document level; the only override surface is the per-slice `authority-override` on `plan.yaml` (a per-Evidence `authority-overrides` surface is deferred to a future RFC).

lead.description: Lead id (matches a `## Lead inventory` block in `discovery.md`) the Evidence is bound to.

claims.description: Per-claim extraction records. Empty `claims: []` is valid; failure is signalled by not writing the Evidence file at all.

authorityClass.description: Closed authority class per workflow §Authority hierarchy. New classes require updating the workflow contract and schemas together.

claimKind.description: Closed claim-kind enum. New kinds require updating the workflow contract and schemas together. `example` is the runtime capture kind emitted by `captures` and carries open `replay-digest` / `input` / `output` body fields.

id.description: Stable claim identifier (dotted kebab slug, e.g. `password-reset.expiry`). Required when `kind` is `requirement`, `criterion`, or `example`; optional on other kinds.
